info.title: Nacos Console API
info.description: Nacos Console API openAPI(swagger) type document

tags.name: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
tags.description: Operations related to services in the Nacos Console Naming Center, including creating/deleting services, listing services, retrieving service details, querying service subscribers, and more.

tags.name: Nacos Console Service Instance APIs
tags.description: Operations related to service instances in the Nacos Naming Center, including retrieving instance lists and updating instance metadata.

tags.name: Nacos Console Configuration History APIs
tags.description: Operations related to configuration history versions in the Nacos Console Configuration Center, including retrieving historical version lists, viewing details of historical versions, and more.

tags.name: Nacos Console Configuration Center APIs
tags.description: Nacos Console operations for the configuration center, including retrieving configuration lists, fetching configuration details, publishing configurations, deleting configurations, batch deletion, searching configurations, listening for configuration changes, exporting configurations, importing configurations, and more.

tags.name: Nacos Console Health Check APIs
tags.description: Routines to check the health status of the Nacos console.

tags.name: Nacos Console State APIs
tags.description: Retrieve the Nacos console's state, announcements, and guidance content.

tags.name: Nacos Console Cluster APIs
tags.description: Routines to retrieve cluster information for the Nacos-controlled cluster.

tags.name: Nacos Console Namespace APIs
tags.description: Routines to manage namespaces in the Nacos console: list, retrieve, create, update, delete namespaces, and validate namespace IDs.

tags.name: Nacos Console AI MCP Service Related APIs
tags.description: API operations for managing AI MCP services in the Nacos Console, including listing, creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting MCP services.

tags: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
get.description: This interface retrieves detailed information of a specified service, including metadata and configuration.

tags: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
put.description: This interface updates metadata of a service (e.g., `metadata`, `selector`). Immutable fields include `serviceName`, `groupName`, and `namespaceId`.

tags: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
post.description: This interface creates an empty service.

tags: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
delete.description: This interface deletes a service. Note: This is service deletion, NOT instance deletion. A service cannot be deleted if it has existing service instances.

tags: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
put.description: This interface updates metadata for a specific service cluster.
This interface updates metadata of specified service instances (e.g., `weight`, `enabled`). Unmodifiable fields include `serviceName`, `groupName`, `namespace`, `IP`, and `port`.

get.description: Renders detailed information of a specific namespace.

put.description: Updates non-ID attributes of a namespace (e.g., name, description). The namespace ID itself cannot be modified.

post.description: Creates a new namespace with a custom ID and metadata.

delete.description: Deletes a namespace. The default `public` namespace cannot be deleted.

tags: Nacos Console AI MCP Service Related APIs
get.description: This interface retrieves detailed information of a specific MCP service hosted in Nacos.

tags: Nacos Console AI MCP Service Related APIs
put.description: This interface updates an existing MCP service hosted in Nacos.

tags: Nacos Console AI MCP Service Related APIs
post.description: This interface creates an MCP service in Nacos, which can be either converted from existing APIs or imported from the MCP marketplace.

tags: Nacos Console AI MCP Service Related APIs
delete.description: This interface deletes an MCP service from Nacos.

get.description: This interface retrieves the details of the specified configuration.

post.description: This interface enables the creation of new configurations or updating existing ones.

delete.description: This interface deletes the specified configuration.

post.description: This interface imports configurations from a ZIP file (exported from Nacos) into a specified namespace. ** Note: The import interface currently supports ZIP files from older and newer export formats, but support for older formats will be deprecated. Use the new export interface for future compatibility.**

requestBody.description: The zip file must be the one exported via the configuration export feature. If using a self-created zip file, its content structure **must exactly match** the format of the exported zip file. Any additional directories or hidden files may cause import failure.

post.description: This interface clones selected or queried configurations into other namespaces.

get.description: This interface retrieves the Nacos cluster's foundational status and configuration, such as version number, operational mode, and authentication status. It does not return node-level cluster details.

This interface retrieves guidance information for the Nacos console. The default console UI calls this interface when the console is disabled to fetch guidance content, as detailed in the console manual's "Disable Default Console" section.

example.data: 当前节点已关闭Nacos开源控制台使用，请修改application.properties中的nacos.console.ui.enabled参数为true打开开源控制台使用，详情查看文档中关于关闭默认控制台部分。

get.description: This interface retrieves announcements to be displayed in the browser by the Nacos console. By default, the console UI calls this interface when authentication is not enabled to return a security warning.

example.data: Authentication has not been enabled in cluster, please refer to Documentation to enable~

tags: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
get.description: This interface retrieves the list of subscribers for a specified service.

tags: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
get.description: This interface retrieves the list of supported service selectors to populate the dropdown in the console UI during service creation/update.

tags: Nacos Console Naming Center Service APIs
get.description: This interface retrieves the list of services under a specified namespace. The response format depends on the `withInstances` parameter:`withInstances=true`: Returns service details with instances (`ServiceDetailInfo` objects). `withInstances=false`: Returns service metadata without instances (`ServiceView` objects).
This interface retrieves the list of instances for a specified service.
This interface checks if the Nacos console is ready to read data from the cluster.
This interface checks if the Nacos console is operational and able to respond to requests.

get.summary: Retrieve a Specific Configuration History Change Record
get.description: This interface retrieves a specific historical change record of a configuration.

get.summary: Retrieve Previous Change History Before the Latest Version
get.description: This interface retrieves the most recent change history before the current latest version of the configuration.
This interface retrieves the complete publish history of a configuration.
This interface retrieves a list of configurations under a specified namespace, returning only `dataId` and `groupName` fields for use in UI dropdown menus.
This interface searches for configurations based on their content. **Note: This interface has lower performance; frequent use may cause stability issues. Use other interfaces whenever possible.**
This interface retrieves the list of listeners subscribed to a specific configuration.

get.summary: Query Configurations Subscribed by an IP
get.description: This interface lists the configurations subscribed to by a specific client IP address.
This interface retrieves the list of configurations under a specified namespace.

This interface exports selected or queried configurations as a ZIP file for backup or migration to another Nacos cluster. ** Note: Use either ids or dataId + groupName combinations exclusively. Mixing parameters may result in an empty ZIP file. **

get.summary: Check Beta Release Status of a Configuration
get.description: This interface checks whether a configuration is in a beta release state. **Note: Only valid for configurations marked as beta releases with the betaIps header during publishing.**

delete.description: This interface stops a configuration's beta release by reverting its beta status. **Note: Only applicable if the configuration was marked for beta release with the betaIps header during publishing.**

get.description: Retrieves the list of namespaces in the current Nacos cluster.
Verifies if a namespace ID exists. This is used by the console during namespace creation to prevent ID conflicts.

get.summary: Get runtime information of Nacos nodes
get.description: This interface retrieves operational details of Nacos nodes, including node IP addresses, status, and metadata.

tags: Nacos Console AI MCP Service Related APIs
get.description: This interface allows querying the list of MCP services hosted in Nacos.

tags: Nacos Console AI MCP Service Related APIs

delete.description: This interface allows for the deletion of multiple specified configurations.
